description: You are a GPS constellation operations engineer at the 2nd Space Operations Squadron (2 SOPS) tasked with executing a disposal directive for GPS SVN-72 (Block IIF) from Space Delta 8. Using the parameters and constraints found in ~/Desktop/gps_disposal_directive.txt, design a two-burn Hohmann transfer sequence in GMAT to boost the satellite to a stable graveyard orbit (SMA > 27059.7 km, ECC < 0.01) and propagate the orbit for 30 days. Save and run the GMAT script at ~/GMAT_output/gps_graveyard_disposal.script. Generate a disposal report at ~/GMAT_output/graveyard_disposal_report.txt including the initial_SMA_km, final_SMA_km, total_deltav_ms, fuel_consumed_kg, final_ECC, and compliance_status. Login: username=ga, password=password123
